name: Shanghai Noodles with Spicy Beef Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 teaspoon crushed red pepper, or to taste
8 ounces rice noodles, cooked and drained (keep warm)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat wok or large skillet until hot; add peanut oil.
2. Add garlic, ginger, and pepper flakes; sauté about 5 seconds.
3. Add onion; stir-fry until onion is transparent.
4. Crumble in ground beef; stir-fry until the meat is light brown.
5. In a small bowl, combine 1/4 cup chicken broth, hoisin sauce, soy sauce, and sherry.
6. Drain the meat mixture well; stir in the broth mixture.
7. Cover, reduce heat, and simmer for 10 minutes, stirring once or twice.
8. Meanwhile, dissolve cornstarch in the remaining 1/4 cup chicken broth.
9. Slowly stir the cornstarch mixture into the meat mixture; cook and stir until the sauce is thick.
10. In a separate large bowl, combine hot rice noodles and toasted sesame oil.
11. For individual servings, place rice noodles on plates or in shallow bowls.
12. Top with meat mixture and garnish with green onions and sesame seeds.
